name: Pumpkin Chocolate Chip Cookies #6
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve baking soda in milk; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, add pumpkin, sugar, oil, and egg; stir until combined.
3. Add flour, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, and the baking soda mixture to the bowl; mix well.
4. Stir in chocolate chips and vanilla.
5. Spoon portions onto a cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 12 minutes, or until done. MMMM, MMMM, Good! Double your pleasure, double your recipe
